# قافية (Qafiyah)

> Free, open-source reference for Arabic poetry. Catalogs classical and modern Arabic poems indexed by poet, era, meter, rhyme, and theme. Site language is Arabic; URLs use Latin transliteration of Arabic slugs.

## Browse

- [Poets](https://qafiyah.com/poets/page/1): Paginated index of poets
- [Meters](https://qafiyah.com/meters): Classical Arabic meters (al-ʿarūḍ)
- [Rhymes](https://qafiyah.com/rhymes): Rhyme letters (qāfiyah)
- [Themes](https://qafiyah.com/themes): Thematic categories

## Data & API

- [Public API docs](https://api.qafiyah.com/v1/docs): Read-only JSON HTTP API
- [API llms.txt](https://api.qafiyah.com/llms.txt): Machine-readable index of API endpoints
- [OpenAPI spec](https://api.qafiyah.com/v1/openapi.json): OpenAPI 3 specification
- [Database dumps](https://github.com/alwalxed/qafiyah/tree/main/dumps): Periodic Postgres snapshots
- [Random poem](https://api.qafiyah.com/v1/poems/random): Random poem slug (text/plain)

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/alwalxed/qafiyah): Monorepo source
- [Sitemap](https://qafiyah.com/sitemap-index.xml): Full URL index
